name: Dependency Cache Manager
description: Auto-detects project types and configures package manager cache directories to use a named volume mount point, reducing rebuild times from minutes to seconds

autoDetect.description: Automatically detect project types and configure appropriate caches

tools.description: Comma-separated list of tools to configure (npm, yarn, pnpm, pip, cargo, gradle, maven, go, uv). Overrides auto-detect when set.

cachePath.description: Base path for cache directories. Add a named volume mount targeting this path in devcontainer.json.

printMountConfig.description: Print the required devcontainer.json mounts configuration after setup
